expected_properties: When din_valid is deasserted, dout_valid must remain low and dout_parallel must not change.
additional_cases.goal: Verify that deasserted din_valid prevents any update to dout_parallel and keeps dout_valid low.
notes: Ensures the module respects the din_valid control even when serial data toggles.
stimulus_intent: Drive din_valid low while toggling din_serial over several cycles and confirm no observable output change.
timing_assumptions: Observe outputs over multiple clock cycles after stimulus; no fixed latency assumed.

expected_properties: After eight consecutive cycles with din_valid asserted, dout_valid becomes 1 and dout_parallel reflects the transmitted bits in MSB‑to‑LSB order.
baseline_case_enrichments.goal: Validate normal serial‑to‑parallel conversion operation under nominal conditions.
notes: Assumes synchronous reset and rising‑edge clock as described in the contract.
stimulus_intent: Provide a sequence of eight din_serial bits with din_valid asserted each cycle.
timing_assumptions: Observe dout_valid and dout_parallel after the eighth clock edge; no exact-cycle latency is assumed.
